chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5157 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No.22774/2024 (stay). 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. As sought, petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
